data.body: optionality CI-red fix (bug demoniac-cerebral-coral / 0582-74a2-1811-43f0): made httpx+pydantic_ai imports lazy in src/rebar/llm/failure.py; added pydantic_ai+httpx to _HEAVY in tests/unit/test_core_optionality.py (closes AST-guard gap; that guard runs in the Gerrit Verified suite via make test). Gerrit change 529 pushed. Not closing ticket until Verified=+1. Full-suite 5321 passed; 1 pre-existing env-only failure (resolve_symbol/yaml repo-local venv py3.14, unrelated).
